subject: A fire-wielding female-presenting figure in red clothing faces a massive dark creature, projecting large flames from both hands
description: A female-presenting humanoid figure in red-orange clothing and armor stands in the center of the frame, both arms extended and projecting roaring flames outward. The flames form large arcs to either side and a fireball above. Behind her to the left, at least one other figure is partially visible in the firelight. To the right, a massive dark clawed hand — belonging to a large creature — reaches toward her. The background is dark. The figure is fire-elemental in nature, matching the Chandra Nalaar archetype closely; the flavor text names her. Flagging as suspected IP at medium confidence — visual is consistent but iconic details are not resolvable at this resolution without the name cue.
foreground: fire-wielding female figure projecting flames, large creature claw at right
background: dark void, firelight, secondary figures at left
